buildCommand: cd ../.. && pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/motohub run build
ignoreCommand: cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && git diff --quiet HEAD^ HEAD -- artifacts/motohub artifacts/api-server lib package.json pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml && exit 0 || exit 1
